item.title: Paradise Revealed
item.description: Man, emboldened by his analytical delusions of godhead, partakes of the fruit of the Tree of Life, and discovers, to his chagrin, the price of immortality is confinement in a simulacrum of existence.

item.title: Journal of Captain Ryckert van Renssalar
item.description: Herein contains the uncovered diary of the 16th century Dutch ship captain, Ryckert van Renssalar.

item.title: Poetics
item.description: This work provides a rough sketch of what a formalization of metrical poetry would entail.

item.title: Absurdity
item.description: An atom, born into a universe beyond its comprehension, navigates the absurdity of Being.

item.title: Palindromics
item.description: This work formalizes the constraints the palindromes of any language and corpus must satisfy independently of the semantic interpretation of their constituent words and sentences.
